Added_Other.purpose: Allows more players to join games, enhancing multiplayer experiences.

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures better video quality by preventing the use of problematic hardware.

Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest features and fixes by linking game updates directly to the codebase.

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and efficiency of string updates during gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString

Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance in loading and managing game assets from the repository.
